steps.t: The first Orc-camp can be found to the south of Walstow. Winsig has suggested that you investigate the path near the East Wall as well as the camp acr…
The second Orc-camp can be found to the north-west of Walstow. Winsig has suggested that you investigate the path near the East Wall as well as the ca…
The Rohirrim helm lays on the ground near the pathway to the East Wall. You should examine the Rohirrim helm.
Winsig is in the Mead Hall of Walstow. You should return to Winsig with news of your discoveries.
